scripts.start: yarn proto && yarn tsc --target ES6 --sourceMap false --module CommonJS --skipLibCheck --outDir ./dist/src src/index.ts && node dist/src/index.js
scripts.deterministic: yarn proto && yarn tsc --target ES6 --sourceMap false --module CommonJS --skipLibCheck --outDir ./dist/src src/deterministic.ts && node dist/src/deterministic.js
